title: How Marvelous, How Wise, How Great

verses.text: Foreknown before the world began, according to his gracious plan, God destined I must be conformed to Jesus Christ, the man, who lived and loved as no man can: a glorious decree.
He bore my sin on Calvary’s tree and righteousness bestowed on me, that I might see his face. God justified me, set me free, and glorified I soon will be: how marvelous this grace.
What have I now but to embrace the God who saved me from disgrace and love him evermore, and with contentment run my race, my eyes fixed ever on his face to praise him and adore.
